raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J-12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works (Marquez & Tan, Constitutional AI variants) and identifies sharp delta (logical inconsistency in citation).",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing or wrong citations (Marquez & Tan), audits every load-bearing citation, and provides bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about Marquez & Tan's actual result).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (logical inconsistency, overclaiming, weakly-supported numbers).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., 'Unsupported load-bearing claim')."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works (Marquez & Tan, Constitutional AI variants) and identifies sharp delta (logical inconsistency in citation).
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing or wrong citations (Marquez & Tan), audits every load-bearing citation, and provides bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about Marquez & Tan's actual result).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (logical inconsistency, overclaiming, weakly-supported numbers).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., 'Unsupported load-bearing claim').
